_comment: === APP HR INTELLIGENCE REACTIVE EXAMPLE - INSTANCE DATA ===
_description: 520 employees across 20 departments, 12 locations, 8 levels, 30 skills, 15 training programs, 25 teams with full relator instances

hr-req-description.en: Design and implement scalable data pipelines, work with cross-functional teams to deliver real-time analytics infrastructure.

hr-req-justification.en: Team capacity at 95%. Two critical data migration projects starting Q2 require dedicated engineering resource.

hr-req-description.en: Own the product roadmap for the analytics platform, collaborate with engineering and design to deliver customer-facing features.

hr-req-justification.en: New product line launching in Q3; need dedicated PM to manage requirements, stakeholders, and go-to-market strategy.

hr-req-description.en: Create user-centered designs for enterprise applications, conduct user research and usability testing.

hr-req-justification.en: Design team backlog growing; current designer-to-developer ratio 1:8, industry standard is 1:5.

hr-req-description.en: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, ensure platform reliability and security.

hr-req-justification.en: Infrastructure team needs dedicated DevOps to reduce deployment cycle time from 2 weeks to 2 days.

instances._comment: === STAGE INSTANCES FOR process-req-003 (completed, all 3 stages) ===

properties.base-decision-rationale-prop: Requisition aligns with approved headcount plan. Salary range within band for L4 Product Manager.
Design team headcount justified by current designer-to-developer ratio analysis. Budget confirmed.
Approved. Design capacity is critical for Q2 product launches. Two positions approved as requested.
Both positions filled. Candidate A starts March 15, Candidate B starts April 1. Offer letters signed.
